2606.16769.title: Skill-to-LoRA: From Using Skills to Learning Behaviors for Token-Efficient LLM Agents
2606.16769.paper_summary: Agent skills are commonly distributed as SKILL.md files: human-readable procedural documents that describe workflows, tools, resources, and domain conventions. While convenient for inspection and reuse, this design requires the same reusable procedure to be repeatedly injected into the runtime context. We propose Skill-to-LoRA(S2L), a behavior-centric skill representation that replaces runtime skill text with skill-specific LoRA adapters. Rather than compressing the skill document itself, S2L models the behavioral change induced by the skill text: offline, the complete SKILL.md is used to synthesize skill-guided demonstrations; online, the full document is omitted and the corresponding LoRA adapter is dynamically loaded to activate the learned skill behavior. We evaluate S2L with Qwen3.6-27B on a 21-skill subset of SWE-Skills-Bench. Compared with the no-skill and Full Skill Text baselines, S2L improves pass rate by 2.9 and 5.2 percentage points, respectively, while reducing per-step token cost by 6.6% relative to Full Skill Text prompting. S2L matches or improves Full Skill Text on 18/21 skills and the no-skill baseline on 15/21 skills. Control experiments further show that the gains depend on skill-specific adapter alignment: Wrong-LoRA and Shared-LoRA both reduce performance. These results suggest that many procedural agent skills can be converted from runtime instructions into trainable, dynamically loadable behavioral modules. Code will be released upon acceptance.
2606.16769.paper_summary_zh: 代理技能通常以 SKILL.md 文件的形式分發：這些是可供人閱讀的程序文件，描述了工作流程、工具、資源和領域慣例。雖然這種設計方便檢查和重用，但它要求相同的可重用程序在運行時上下文中反覆注入。我們提出了 Skill-to-LoRA(S2L)，這是一種以行為為中心的技能表示，將運行時技能文本替換為特定技能的 LoRA 適配器。S2L 並不是壓縮技能文件本身，而是建模由技能文本引起的行為變化：在離線時，完整的 SKILL.md 用於合成技能指導的演示；在線時，完整文件被省略，相應的 LoRA 適配器會動態加載以激活學習到的技能行為。我們在 SWE-Skills-Bench 的 21 個技能子集上使用 Qwen3.6-27B 評估 S2L。與無技能和完整技能文本基準相比，S2L 分別提高了 2.9 和 5.2 個百分點的通過率，同時相對於完整技能文本提示將每步的令牌成本降低了 6.6%。S2L 在 18/21 個技能上與完整技能文本相匹配或有所改善，並在 15/21 個技能上超越無技能基準。控制實驗進一步顯示，增益依賴於特定技能適配器的對齊：Wrong-LoRA 和 Shared-LoRA 都會降低性能。這些結果表明，許多程序代理技能可以從運行時指令轉換為可訓練的、動態加載的行為模塊。代碼將在接受後發布。
2606.16769.author: Tianyi Zhang et.al.
